crossref.abstract: <jats:p>TIPS-PPP, a novel TIPS-PEN derivative, features a vertically extended pentacene core for increased π–π overlap, enabling exploration of structure–morphology–property connections and exhibiting enhanced stability/electronic performance.</jats:p>
title: Shear-aligned large-area organic semiconductor crystals through extended π–π interaction
